properties.displayName: Storage accounts should use customer-managed key for encryption in Mission Platform products and services
properties.description: This policy applies exclusively to Mission Platform products and services; usage outside of these scopes is not supported. Secure your blob and file storage account with greater flexibility using customer-managed keys. When you specify a customer-managed key, that key is used to protect and control access to the key that encrypts your data. Using customer-managed keys provides additional capabilities to control rotation of the key encryption key or cryptographically erase data.

metadata.description: Enable or disable the execution of the policy
